description: A quiet winter mechanical seagull scene pet standing on a floating ice floe beside a small postal bucket.

idle.notes: Calm breathing and blink loop with the gull, floe, and postal bucket held together as one quiet scene.

walk.notes: Not a literal bird walk. These rows are directional scene-slide loops for drag and walk mapping.

curious.notes: Small attentive head lift and side-look toward the bucket or distant movement.

happy.notes: Gentle open-beak happy chirp with tiny scarf motion while the bucket stays grounded.

sleep.notes: Soft closed-eye watch-duty nap without breaking the upright scene silhouette.

probe.notes: Auxiliary post-duty adjustment loop with tiny bucket glance and posture reset.

float.notes: Tiny buoyant floe-bob loop where the full scene rises and settles together.

melancholy.notes: Mild weary droop and recovery loop, still patient and on duty.

walk_right.notes: Scene glides right while the seagull keeps its planted floe stance.

walk_left.notes: Scene glides left while the seagull keeps its planted floe stance.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the true-facing scene-slide rows rather than a standard walk cycle.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses a true left-facing strip
right drag uses a true right-facing strip
walk-left and walk-right are not swapped
left-facing row keeps the seagull, floe, and postal bucket directionally unified
right-facing row keeps the seagull, floe, and postal bucket directionally unified
hat, scarf, floating ice, and postal bucket remain present in both directional rows
postal bucket stays attached to the same scene and does not drift during drag-facing rows
